source_label: Rocq wiki — Alternative names ("in English, sound like rock"; short for Rocquencourt)
notes: The Rocq Prover is the new name of the Coq proof assistant, official since the 9.0 release in March 2025. It is pronounced simply "rock" — the name honors Inria Rocquencourt, where the system was born, and echoes the mythical bird Roc; the final q is silent. Do not carry over the old Coq /kɒk/ vowel or read the French -cq as "kew".
